title: cymbopappus hilliardiae
intro: Cymbopappus hilliardiae, also known as the Hilliard's daisy, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. This plant is known for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. Cymbopappus hilliardiae has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, digestive problems, and respiratory infections. It can be prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, which are commonly used in traditional medicine, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
